titulo: Anthropic and the Government of Rwanda sign MOU for AI in health and education
resumen: Anthropic y el gobierno de Ruanda formalizaron una asociación de tres años para desplegar IA en educación, salud y sistemas del sector público. El acuerdo representa el primer MOU multisectorial gubernamental de Anthropic en el continente africano.
contenido:
Anthropic and Rwanda's government formalized a three-year partnership to deploy AI across education, health, and public sector systems. The agreement builds on prior education initiatives and represents Anthropic's first multi-sector government MOU on the African continent, focusing on capacity building and responsible AI deployment.

[Leer artículo completo](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-rwanda-mou)
